member.name: T:CommunicationService.API.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController
member.summary: Event-driven notifications: create, template send, logs, templates (DTO-only responses).

member.name: M:CommunicationService.API.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.Create(CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.CreateNotificationRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a notification with recipients, channels, and queue entry.

member.name: M:CommunicationService.API.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.SendTemplate(CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.SendTemplateNotificationRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends using a single template + channel (convenience over POST /notifications).

member.name: M:CommunicationService.API.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.GetById(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets notification by id (includes aggregate counts).

member.name: M:CommunicationService.API.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.GetLogs(Healthcare.Common.Pagination.PagedQuery,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists delivery attempt logs (paged), optionally filtered by channel id.

member.name: M:CommunicationService.API.Controllers.v1.NotificationsController.GetTemplates(Healthcare.Common.Pagination.PagedQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists templates for the current tenant/facility scope (paged).
